purpose: Durable non-secret reservation calendar for scheduled YouTube publication slots across all 51 public support-language channels.
notes: This file stores planned/scheduled publishAt reservations only. It does not contain OAuth tokens, secrets, video files or API credentials.
Reservations are keyed by setId + supportLang + targetLang + channelKey. Regional variants stay in supportLang/targetLang, while shared EN/ES/PT public channels use one channelKey calendar.
GitHub workflow artifacts are raw evidence. Commit reviewed calendar updates after scheduled plan/apply runs before relying on them in later separate runs.
